title: users table is in 3NF

evidence.observed: model User { id Int @id; email String; name String }

expected: No repeating groups or transitive dependencies.

title: users primary key uses random UUIDv4
expected: Time-ordered ids (UUIDv7/ULID or bigint identity) keep B-tree inserts local.
recommendation: Prefer UUIDv7 or bigint identity for the clustered/insert-heavy PK.

verification.assertion: PK default is a random UUID.

expected_impact.rationale: Random UUID PKs fragment index pages on insert-heavy tables.

title: users.email has no UNIQUE constraint
expected: A business identifier like email should be UNIQUE (and NOT NULL).
recommendation: Add @unique to users.email (and consider NOT NULL).

verification.assertion: A UNIQUE index exists on users(email).
verification.reproduce: psql -c "\d users"  -- expect a unique index on email

expected_impact.rationale: Without UNIQUE, duplicate accounts are possible.

title: row-level security enabled on tenant tables

evidence.observed: ALTER TABLE users ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

verification.reproduce: psql -c "SELECT relrowsecurity FROM pg_class WHERE relname='users';"

title: orders.customer_id foreign key has no covering index
expected: In Postgres the referencing side of a FK is not auto-indexed; orders(customer_id) needs its own index.
recommendation: CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY orders_customer_id_idx ON orders (customer_id);
fix_preview: + CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY orders_customer_id_idx ON orders (customer_id);

verification.assertion: An index exists whose leading column is orders.customer_id.
verification.reproduce: psql "$DATABASE_URL" -c "SELECT 1 FROM pg_index i WHERE i.indrelid='orders'::regclass AND (i.indkey::int2[])[0] = (SELECT attnum FROM pg_attribute WHERE attrelid='orders'::regclass AND attname='customer_id');"  -- must return 1 row

expected_impact.rationale: Unindexed FK forces sequential scans on joins and scans children on parent DELETE.

title: hot query selects all columns
expected: Select only needed columns to enable covering indexes and cut I/O.
recommendation: Project the explicit column list used by the caller.

expected_impact.rationale: SELECT * defeats covering indexes and inflates payloads.

title: connection pooling for serverless cannot be verified offline

evidence.observed: DATABASE_URL points at a direct Postgres port (5432); no pooler config found in repo.

expected: Serverless runtimes should connect through a transaction-mode pooler (pgbouncer/Supabase pooler on 6543).
recommendation: Confirm pooler usage; route serverless connections through the pooler endpoint.

verification.assertion: Live connection count stays bounded under concurrency.

expected_impact.rationale: Direct connections from serverless exhaust Postgres connection slots.

title: partitioning not applicable at current scale

evidence.observed: orders is a small OLTP table; no time/range partition key indicated.

expected: Partitioning is only warranted at large scale.

verification.assertion: Table size does not warrant partitioning.

expected_impact.rationale: Premature partitioning adds complexity with no benefit.
